nasb.text: If you make an altar of stone for Me, you shall not build it of cut stones, for if you wield your tool on it, you will profane it.

esv.text: If you make me an altar of stone, you shall not build it of hewn stones, for if you wield your tool on it you profane it.

cnv.text: 你若是為我築一座石壇，不可用鑿過的石頭來建築，因為你在石頭上一動用工具，就把壇污穢了。

ccb.text: 你们若为我筑石坛，不可用凿刻的石头，因为用工具凿刻的石头会玷污祭坛。
